A '''planet''' was the site of a [[Battle of unidentified planet (Yoda's charge)|battle]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Description==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] had [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] as well as dry, barren, open lands.

==History==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] led a force of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] into [[Battle of unidentified planet (Yoda's charge)|battle]] against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] from astride [[Yoda's kybuck|his]] [[Kybuck/Legends|kybuck]]. [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] was also present, along with another Jedi and several others.

{{Planet-stub}}
